Tasks.RawDefinition:
:
  # --- roots (no dependencies) -------------------------------------------
  - key: checkout
    run: echo "[checkout] fetching source"; sleep 1

- key: sys-packages
    run: echo "[sys-packages] apt install jq protobuf"; sleep 2

- key: go-toolchain
    run: echo "[go-toolchain] install go 1.26"; sleep 2

- key: node-toolchain
    run: echo "[node-toolchain] install node 20"; sleep 2

- key: python-toolchain
    run: echo "[python-toolchain] install python 3.12"; sleep 1

# --- dependency resolution ---------------------------------------------
  - key: go-deps
    use: [checkout, go-toolchain]
    run: |
      echo "[go-deps] go mod download"
      if [ "${{ init.chaos }}" = "true" ]; then
        echo "go: module resolution failed (injected chaos)" >&2
        exit 1
      fi
      sleep 2

- key: node-deps
    use: [checkout, node-toolchain]
    run: echo "[node-deps] npm ci"; sleep 2

- key: py-deps
    use: [checkout, python-toolchain]
    run: echo "[py-deps] pip install -r requirements.txt"; sleep 1

- key: proto-gen
    use: [checkout, sys-packages]
    run: echo "[proto-gen] protoc --gen"; sleep 2

Tasks.RawDefinition:
- key: notify
    use: [publish, docs]
    run: echo "[notify] post to slack"; sleep 1

- key: base-image
  docker: true
  run: $RWX_PACKAGE_PATH/bootstrap.sh
  env:
    IMAGE: ubuntu:24.04

- key: base-config
  use: base-image
  call: rwx/base 1.1.1

Subtasks.RawDefinition:
:
  - key: configure
    run: |
      source "$RWX_PACKAGE_PATH/scripts/rwx-utils.sh"

      supported_os_version=("ubuntu 20.04" "ubuntu 22.04" "ubuntu 24.04" "ubuntu 26.04" "debian 11" "debian 12" "debian 13")
      current_os_version="$(rwx_os_name_version)"

      supported=false
      for os_v in "${supported_os_version[@]}"; do
        if [[ "$current_os_version" == "$os_v" ]]; then
          supported=true
          break
        fi
      done

      if $supported; then
        echo "Configuring $current_os_version"
      else
        error_file="$(mktemp "$RWX_ERRORS/error-XXXX")"
        echo -e "Operating system not supported by \`rwx/base\`: ${current_os_version}\n" | tee -a $error_file
        echo "You can pass \`config: none\` to use the image without the RWX base configuration" | tee -a $error_file
        exit 1
      fi

      export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

      echo "LANG=C.UTF-8" > /etc/default/locale
      cat /etc/default/locale >> /etc/environment

      ${RWX_PACKAGE_PATH}/scripts/apt-mirror.sh
      ${RWX_PACKAGE_PATH}/scripts/apt-install.sh
      ${RWX_PACKAGE_PATH}/scripts/user.sh
      ${RWX_PACKAGE_PATH}/scripts/configure.sh
      echo 1000 | tee $RWX_IMAGE/user

- key: docker
    use: configure
    run: |
      sudo RWX_PACKAGE_PATH="$RWX_PACKAGE_PATH" ${RWX_PACKAGE_PATH}/scripts/docker.sh
      docker --version

Title: CLI initiated run of .rwx/sample-dag.yml
